zh.Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Beauchamp於1278年出生在英國多瑟特黑爾波內時，她的父親Humphrey de Beauchamp11275歲，母親Sybil Oliver24歲。她於大約1295年與William de Herle在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年8月在法國皮卡迪索姆享年46歲。

zh-hans.Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Beauchamp于1278年出生在英国多瑟特黑爾波內时，她的父亲Humphrey de Beauchamp11275岁，母亲Sybil Oliver24岁。她于大约1295年与William de Herle在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年8月在法国皮卡迪索姆享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Beauchamp was born in 1278, in Sherborne, Dorset, England, her father, Humphrey de Beauchamp, was 11275 and her mother, Sybil Oliver, was 24. She married William de Herle about 1295, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in August 1324, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Beauchamp est née en 1278, à Sherborne, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Beauchamp, avait 11275 ans et sa mère, Sybil Oliver, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William de Herle environ 1295, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en août 1324, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Beauchamp 1278 in Sherborne, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey de Beauchamp 11275 und ihre Mutter Sybil Oliver 24. Sie hat um 1295 in England William de Herle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im August 1324 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Beauchamp è nata il nel 1278 nel Sherborne, Dorset, England, sua padre, Humphrey de Beauchamp, aveva 11275 anni e sua madre, Sybil Oliver, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William de Herle circa 1295, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel agosto 1324, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Beauchampが1278年にイギリスドールセトシェルボルンで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Beauchampは11275歳，母Sybil Oliverは24歳であった。約1295年にイギリスでWilliam de Herleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年8月にフランスピカーディソンメで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Beauchamp(이)가 1278년 영국 도르세트 셔본에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Beauchamp(은)는 11275세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Oliver(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국에서 William de Herle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 8월 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Beauchamp nasceu em 1278, em Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey de Beauchamp, tinha 11275 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Oliver, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Herle aproximadamente 1295, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1324, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Beauchamp родилась в 1278 г. в местности ширборн, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey de Beauchamp было 11275 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Oliver, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Herle около 1295 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла август 1324 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Beauchamp nació en 1278, en Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey de Beauchamp, tenía 11275 años y su mamá, Sybil Oliver, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William de Herle aproximadamente 1295, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en agosto de 1324, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
